name: YTLite
subtitle: Lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+
description: A lightweight YouTube client with SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, and up to 1080p playback. No ads, no tracking, no dependencies.

apps.name: YTLite
apps.subtitle: YouTube client for iOS 12+

versions.localizedDescription:
New Features
- Add channel filter to Subscriptions screen
- Speed up playback start: persist visitorData, play immediately

Bug Fixes
- Fix player hidden behind nav bar on iOS 26+
- Fix landscape/fullscreen transitions and controls layout
- Fix mini-player background pause and iOS 12 chevron inset
- Fix lock-screen autoplay and Control Center audio hiccup
- Restore suggestion-autoplay countdown
- Restore subscriptions order client-side (WEB browse rejected for device tokens)

UI/UX
- Unify navigation bar style with consistent chevron alignment
- One chevron button on every screen; no PiP from minimized player
- Align nav chevrons during transitions for smooth navigation

apps.localizedDescription: A lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+. No ads, no tracking. Features: SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, 1080p playback, background audio, PiP, subtitles, and more.
